title: Ballistix: Refreshed
description: A fresh coat of paint for the Ballistix mod
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f231389ea3c5434defd3aa455358db0f9feddf42.png)

Ballistix: Refreshed aims to bring a fresh take on Aurilisdev's Ballistix mod. Most textures have been updated, models have been tweaked or completely redone, and all tier 3+ explosives are animated.

![Missiles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ab5abfde5623a3c12334431dd62924f4197f2e1_0.webp)

Credit to the creator of the Ballistix mod, Sebastian Siljuholtet Johansen. Go check out the Ballistix mod [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ballistix) if you haven't already.

Tested on 1.20.1, but may work fine on some other versions.
